passives.name: Preparation
passives.effects: After being [[Combat status|out-of-combat]] with enemy champions for 8 seconds, gain {{as|{{rd|11|5}} lethality}}. This bonus remains for 3 seconds after dealing damage to an enemy champion.

passives.name: Extraction
passives.effects: Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them grants you {{as|200 '''bonus''' movement speed}} that decays over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: After 8 seconds out of combat with enemy champions, gain lethality. Bonus persists 3 seconds after dealing damage to a champion.
Takedown on a champion within 3 seconds of damaging them grants 200 bonus movement speed that decays over 1.5 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Opportunity is modeled as assassin tempo itemization: out-of-combat lethality priming and takedown-based burst mobility for rapid repositioning.
Lethality bonus differs for melee vs ranged (11 melee, 5 ranged).

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
